query_intent: For 1998 inventory, identify warehouse-item combinations with high monthly variability (coefficient of variation > 1), then compare January and February mean/cov values for the same warehouse-item pairs.

dag_nodes.intent: Compute monthly mean and standard deviation of on-hand inventory by warehouse and item, derive coefficient of variation, and keep high-variability groups.
Self-join the variability-filtered inventory summary for month 1 and month 2 on the same warehouse-item keys and return side-by-side monthly statistics.
